formula.experiment: T1 iter34 HYBRID — 8-item auxiliary-task chain × multi-base ensemble {LGB, XGB-hist, ExtraTrees}
formula.family_wise_independence_claim: Single pre-registered post-publication run; not part of iter33-B canonical-update family of comparisons (council 2026-05-06).

cohort.filter: PD with full items 9-14, 15, 18 (matches iter33-B 8-item filter)

model_ensemble: RegressorChain(XGBRegressor hist, n=500, lr=0.05, depth=4, min_child=5)
stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across 3 bases per fold per seed
stage2.post_combine_formula: Stage1_pred + (sum_over_T1_SUM_ITEMS(mean_over_bases(item_pred) + train_mean) - sum(train_mean[T1_SUM_ITEMS]))  -- aux items 15,18 used in chain fit only
stage2.decorrelation_argument: F68 (iter33-B) 8-item auxiliary chain regularizes via shared latent severity. F69 (iter33-C) different base learners produce decorrelated chain OOFs. Hybrid combines both — auxiliary regularization (variance via cross-task signal) × base diversity (variance via algorithmic decorrelation). Independent levers, multiplicative effect predicted.

eval.headline_metric: CCC of mean-of-3-seed predictions vs y_t1
eval.comparator_iter5_direct_loocv: computed live in same SID-aligned LOOCV

lockbox_rules: ONE pre-registered config. ONE LOOCV run. POST-PUBLICATION REPLICATION TARGET.
Headline = CCC of mean-of-3-seed preds (each seed averages 3 base learners).
Verdict frame: replication target — interpret in light of family-wise iter33 priors.
Bonferroni adjustment trivial (n_tests=1) since this is a SINGLE replication run.
Verdict 'lift' if paired-bootstrap (n=5000) frac>0 vs iter33-B ≥ 0.95.
Verdict 'tied' otherwise (within sampling noise — interpret as no improvement).

family_wise_independence_claim: Single bug-fix replication of iter34 on the post-2026-05-09-09d2e19 validated loader (NLS036 excluded due to invalid item-15 total=18 from raw codes 9/9). Identical formula_sha256 = original lockbox prereg's. Not a new FWER family member; analogous to T3 iter47 valid-range correction of T3 iter5 (precedent: CCC 0.5227 → 0.3784).
corrective_authority: AGENTS.md (canonical hygiene rule: future loaders fail closed)
user_authorization: User invoked /pd-imu-100x-researcher with 'verify full data validity. then iterate' on 2026-05-10 15:28 UTC. Validity audit surfaced NLS036 item-15 invalid label still poisoning iter34 chain at training time; the prior recommendation 'document only, no post-hoc rerun' (iter48 audit 2026-05-08) is reversed in light of user's explicit 'leave no stone unturned' directive and the publication-track status of iter34.
decision_rules: If new_ccc ≥ 0.7366 (lockbox value): new clean candidate, paper updates.
If new_ccc < 0.7366 but ≥ 0.7000: corrected candidate, document hygiene fragility.
If new_ccc < 0.7000: iter34 supersession warranted; weaker than thought.
